ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_SANITY_POWER.smar:
Upon reaching [blue]{TriggerThreshold}[/blue] stacks, triggers a [gold]Neural Burst[/gold].
The next burst deals [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to this enemy.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_SANITY_BURST_DESC:
Deal [blue]{BaseDamage}[/blue] damage.
Each trigger increases the damage of subsequent [gold]Neural Bursts[/gold] by [blue]{DamageGrowth}%[/blue].
Then remove all [gold]Neural Damage[/gold]. The enemy loses [blue]1[/blue] Strength and gains [blue]1[/blue] Weak this turn.

Deal [blue]{BaseDamage}[/blue] damage.
Each trigger increases the damage of subsequent [gold]Neural Bursts[/gold] by [blue]{DamageGrowth}%[/blue].
Then remove all [gold]Neural Damage[/gold]. The enemy loses [blue]1[/blue] Strength and gains [blue]1[/blue] Weak this turn.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_SANITY_MULTIPLIER: Each stack increases subsequent [gold]Neural Burst[/gold] damage by [blue]15%[/blue].
Each stack increases subsequent [gold]Neural Burst[/gold] damage by [blue]15%[/blue].
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_SANITY_UNLIMIT_PO: Each stack increases [gold]Neural Burst[/gold] damage by an additional [blue]50%[/blue].
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_SANITY_THORNS_POW:
Whenever you take damage, apply that much [blue]Neural Damage[/blue] to the damage source.
Loses [blue]1[/blue] stack at the start of each turn.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_STEALTH_POWER.des: Until your next turn, reduce damage taken by [blue]30%[/blue].
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_STEALTH_POWER.sma: For {Amount} turn(s), reduce damage taken by [blue]30%[/blue].
Whenever you play a card, apply [blue]1[/blue] [blue]Neural Damage[/blue] to ALL enemies.
Whenever you play a card, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [blue]Neural Damage[/blue] to ALL enemies.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_ATTACK_APPLY_SANI: Your Attacks apply an additional [blue]1[/blue] [blue]Neural Damage[/blue].
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_SANITY_BUFF_POWER: Your next Attack applies {Amount} additional [blue]Neural Damage[/blue].
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_SHADOW_FLAG_POWER: At the end of the turn, deal 1 damage to enemies for each [gold]Swift[/gold] card played this turn.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_SHADOW_POWER.desc: At the end of your turn, deal {Amount} damage to ALL enemies.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_SHEILD.title: Tentacle Barrier
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_SHEILD.descriptio: Whenever you play a [gold]Swift[/gold] card, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_SHEILD.smartDescr: Whenever you play a [gold]Swift[/gold] card, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_SUPER_SPEED_POWER: Whenever you play a [gold]Swift[/gold] card, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
Whenever you lose HP 4 times, prevent the next [blue]1[/blue] instance of HP loss.
Whenever you lose HP 4 times, prevent the next [blue]{Amount}[/blue] instance(s) of HP loss.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_FLOATING_SEA_BLOC: Once per turn, grant an ally [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold]. Lose [blue]1[/blue] HP after acting.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_HARVEST_ATTACK_AC: Once per turn, deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies [blue]2[/blue] times. Lose [blue]1[/blue] HP after acting.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_HARVEST_ATTACK_PO: Each stack of [gold]Seabornization[/gold] increases damage by [blue]1[/blue].
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_SEABORNIZATION_PO: Increases the value of this minion's active action by this amount.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_SEABORNING_POOL_P: At the start of your turn, add 2 [gold]Juvenile Seaborn[/gold] to the bottom of your draw pile.
At the start of your turn, add {Cards} [gold]Juvenile Seaborn[/gold] to the bottom of your draw pile.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_CALL_OF_SEA_POWER: The next time you play another card, your Floating Sea Drifter and Basin Sea Reaper each gain an active action.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_HIVE_WILL_POWER.d: At the start of each turn, apply {Amount} [gold]Seabornization[/gold] to all your minions.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_PAIN_ECHO_POWER.s: Whenever a [gold]Neural Burst[/gold] triggers, draw {Amount} card(s).
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_PAIN_ECHO_POWER.d: Whenever a [gold]Neural Burst[/gold] triggers, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_ABERRANT_REGENERA: Whenever you lose HP, gain that much [gold]Block[/gold].
Whenever you lose HP, gain that much [gold]Block[/gold] {Amount} time(s).
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_SHEILD_POWER.desc: Whenever you play a [gold]Swift[/gold] card, gain {Amount} [gold]Block[/gold].
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_BLUE_LIFE_BLOOM_P: At the end of combat, gain {Amount} Max HP.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_GOLD_LIFE_RETURN_: You cannot gain or lose Max HP for the remainder of this combat.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_TIDE_REFLECTION_P: For the rest of this turn, whenever you play a [gold]Swift[/gold] card, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] and apply [blue]1[/blue] [blue]Neural Damage[/blue] to a random enemy.
For the rest of this turn, whenever you play a [gold]Swift[/gold] card, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] and apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [blue]Neural Damage[/blue] to a random enemy.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_PERFECT_ABERRATIO:
Whenever you lose [gold]Max HP[/gold], gain that much [gold]Strength[/gold].
Whenever you gain [gold]Max HP[/gold], deal [blue]3[/blue] times that much damage to ALL enemies.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_COLD_POWER.title: Cold
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_COLD_POWER.descri: At the start of your turn, lose 1 Energy, then remove this effect.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_COLD_POWER.smartD: At the start of your turn, lose {Amount} Energy, then remove this effect.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_IZUMIK_EVOLUTION_: Whenever offspring are sacrificed, Izumik heals and gains [blue]1[/blue] Ecosystem Evolution. Every [blue]3[/blue] stacks grant [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_OFFSPRING_SACRIFI: On the second turn, self-destruct to deal damage equal to current HP, then be absorbed by Izumik, healing it and granting Ecosystem Evolution.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_COLD_WAVE_POWER.d: Whenever this creature takes attack damage that is not fully Blocked, lose [blue]1[/blue] stack. At 0, apply [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Cold[/gold] to all players, then reset to [blue]4[/blue] stacks.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_FROZEN_WATCHER_PO: At the end of the player's turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Cold[/gold] for each [gold]Frozen[/gold] card in hand.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_IZUMIK_PHASE_SHIF: When Izumik's HP falls to [blue]{Amount}[/blue] or lower, enter the second phase and remove this ability.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_EXPLAIN_POWER.des: After {Amount} more cards are played, all players lose [blue]1[/blue] Energy.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_IZUMIK_OFFSPRING_: While offspring exist, unblocked damage dealt to Izumik is randomly redirected to an offspring.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_SANITY_BURST_STRE: Lose [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] until the end of this turn.
Lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] until the end of this turn.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_SHADOW_EVOLUTION_: Whenever you play [blue]6[/blue] [gold]Juvenile Seaborn[/gold], gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Max HP[/gold].
After playing [blue]{CardsLeft}[/blue] more [gold]Juvenile Seaborn[/gold], gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Max HP[/gold].
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_SYNERGY_STRIKE_PO: Whenever you deal unblocked damage this turn, apply {Amount} [blue]Neural Damage[/blue] to the target.
Whenever you deal unblocked damage this turn, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [blue]Neural Damage[/blue] to the target.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_PAIN_AMPLIFY_POWE: Whenever this enemy takes attack damage, apply {Amount} [blue]Neural Damage[/blue]. Removed at end of turn.
Whenever this enemy takes attack damage, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [blue]Neural Damage[/blue]. Removed at end of turn.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_ECHO_ALL_ME_DAMAG: After you play [blue]{Amount}[/blue] more cards, deal [blue]10[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_ECHO_ALL_ME_ENERG: After you play [blue]{Amount}[/blue] more cards, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_ECHO_LONG_ROAD_VU: Take [red]50%[/red] more damage. This effect multiplies separately with [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_YAN_EROSION_POWER: At the start of each player turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] Energy.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_VICTORIA_GLORY_PO: Whenever you would take damage, there is a [blue]25%[/blue] chance to prevent it.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_HEMATOPOIETIC_DIS: While below [blue]80%[/blue] HP, lose [red]1[/red] HP at the end of each player turn.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_FOCUS_DISORDER_PO: Vakuu takes control during the first turn of this combat.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_POWER_ECHO_STRIFE_POWER: At the start of each player turn, ALL creatures gain [blue]1[/blue] Strength.
